name: windows-appshots
description: Capture the current Windows foreground app window for Codex context.

interface.shortDescription: Capture foreground Windows app snapshots for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Windows Appshots captures the foreground Windows application window as a PNG plus metadata and optional UI Automation text, then returns the local snapshot path to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Take a Windows appshot after I switch apps.
Capture the foreground window for debugging.
Create a snapshot of this Windows app state.
